description: Style NoteThe English brand gets it right with these understated denims. This pair of french connection jeans add a distinct personality to your off-duty staples. Get the casual yet dressy look just right with this pair. Wear this with that edgy button-up cardi, over a pastel shirt and a slim tie (with tonal desert boots). A monochrome or a printed tee is the right choice for a pared down look.Product DetailsCharcoal trouser with a button and zipper closure in the front, two insert pockets and two slide-in pockets behind it, double lip welt pockets at the back, two patch pockets below the welt pockets at the back, a buckled tab at the back centre. Has one loop below the waist band at the back to wear a low-slung bet.Material and care100% cottonWash as cottonWash and dry inside outSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
